title: Biome Makeover - Naturalist Compat
description: Remove duplicate items and blocks with the goal of integrating both Biome Makeover and Naturalist so they work as if they were a single mod!
body:
**The goal of these compat mods I'm making is to make mods work better together in modpacks by removing duplicate items, mobs, and blocks. It ensures that anything dependent on the removed items, mobs and blocks still works by redirecting those dependencies to the remaining equivalent items, mobs and blocks.**
## List of changes
### Removed Duplicate Items
- Naturalist Cattail
### Removed Duplicate Blocks
- Naturalist Cattail
### Loot Table Adjustments
- When breaking Biome Makeover's Cattail with bare hands, it will drop Naturalist's Cattail Fluff. However, if broken with shears or a tool enchanted with Silk Touch, it will drop Biome Makeover's Cattail instead.
### World Gen Adjustments
- Removed Naturalist Cattail from world generation
